name: Coconut Oil
summary: Coconut Oil is tracked for Contains saturated fatty acids and medium-chain fatty acid fractions; effects depend on comparator fat and dietary context with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human.
